beschrijving: Index of all rulespeak files. The runner loads only files that match the active value_stream and phase. No semantic interpretation, only metadata matching.

laadinstructie.stap1: Filter files by value_streams: load only when value_streams contains active_value_stream OR value_streams contains 'all'.
laadinstructie.stap2: Filter rules in loaded files by phase: include only rules where fase contains actieve_fase OR fase contains 'all'.
laadinstructie.stap3: Filter rules by entity: include only rules where entiteit contains actieve_entiteit OR entiteit contains 'all'.
laadinstructie.stap4: Evaluate the condition per rule: when conditie != null, evaluate it against execution-context metadata. Exclude on false.

bestanden.omschrijving: System-wide rules that are not bound to a single doctrine
Rules for source stance and exploration (doctrine.bronhouding-en-exploratie.md)
Rules for traceability, provenance codes, and execution identity (doctrine.traceability.md)
Rules for handoff discipline and transfer documents (doctrine.handoff.md)
Rules for retrieval and context selection from the Mandarin graph (doctrine.retrieval-en-contextselectie.md)
Rules for template use and structure assurance in agent contracts and prompts (doctrine.templategebruik.md)
